subject: Re: Ebury Street
body:
this is stupid  of course they can speak to me,, IT is up to me to waive the lawyer not the other way round,, they work for me 

----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, January 3, 2007 9:27:01 AM
Subject: FW: Ebury Street



 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Lesley Groff

Executive Assistant to Jeffrey 
Epstein

 

 




From: john stefanidis 
[mailto:johnstefanidis174@yahoo.co.uk] 
Sent: Tuesday, January 02, 
2007 11:35 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Fwd: Ebury 
Street




Lesley please forward to Jeffrey -thankyou so much.

Note: 
forwarded message attached.
Send instant messages to your online friends http://uk.messenger.yahoo.com 

I so long for this purchase to be completed for both practical and emotional reasons.I assume speaking  to Jeffrey is taboo- even though he is the client's representative ? --is it Macfarlane's or the US lawyers decision to wave away etiquette ?- let us hope they agree as you and J will fix it in a second I am convinced - he knows what the snag is - another ! - as I sent on your e-mail.
  I know you have my very best interest at heart but it does not stop  me wanting the purchase  to be over and done with.
  Hope you are well and looking forward to all that 2007 has to bring that is good and pleasing. Yrs John  
 Send instant messages to your online friends http://uk.messenger.yahoo.com 





__________________________________________________
